mapper.sql: u.id, u.login_name, u.password, u.role, u.name, u.email, s.learning_index AS learning_index, u.department_name, u.last_login_time, u.is_deleted, u.gmt_created, u.gmt_modified, u.avatar
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `user` (id, login_name, password, role, name, email, department_name, avatar) VALUES
(#{users.id}, #{users.loginName}, #{users.password}, #{users.role}, #{users.name}, #{users.email}, #{users.departmentName}, #{users.avatar})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE u.is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = u.id
u.is_deleted = 0
AND u.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{users.loginName}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{users.name}, '%')
SELECT u.department_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS visits FROM `user` u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.department_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.department_name ORDER BY visits DESC LIMIT 10
